case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNCIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNCIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNCIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $123.70 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,848.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

documents.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNCIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $123.70 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,848.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
